name: AeroLeadAI Roof Qualify
description: Outbound qualify call for a lead flagged by AI roof analysis. Greets the homeowner, checks interest, offers appointment times, confirms, and escalates to a live transfer if the caller is distressed, confused, or asks for a human. Import into Bland's Pathway editor (bland.ai dashboard -> Pathways -> Import) and adjust prompts/voice to taste, then set the resulting pathway ID as BLAND_QUALIFY_PATHWAY_ID.

data.name: Greeting
data.text: Hi, this is {{agent_name}} calling on behalf of AeroLeadAI about {{address}} — our records show your roof may have some storm-related wear worth a quick look. Do you have a minute?

data.name: Qualify interest
data.text: Great — we'd like to send someone out for a free inspection to confirm what our imagery flagged and give you a real quote. Would you be open to scheduling a time this week?

data.name: Not interested
data.text: No problem at all, thanks for your time. Have a great day.

data.name: Offer appointment times
data.text: Perfect. I have availability {{proposed_time_1}} or {{proposed_time_2}} — which works better for you?

data.name: Confirm appointment
data.text: Got it, I've got you down for {{confirmed_time}} at {{address}}. You'll get a text confirmation shortly. Anything else I can help with?
extractVars: Did the homeowner clearly agree to the inspection appointment?
The appointment date/time the homeowner confirmed, in ISO 8601 if possible

data.name: Escalate to human
data.text: I want to make sure you get exactly the help you need — let me connect you with a member of our team right now.

edges.label: Homeowner confirms it's a good time
Caller sounds distressed, confused, or asks for a human
Caller sounds distressed, confused, or asks for a human
Caller sounds distressed, confused, or asks for a human

webhook.note: Configure this pathway's post-call webhook (Pathway settings -> Webhook) to POST to {APP_BASE_URL}/api/bland/webhook, with a custom header X-Bland-Webhook-Secret set to your BLAND_WEBHOOK_SECRET value.
